mapper.insert: insert into transaction_history ( account_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after ) values ( #{accountId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter} )
mapper.select: select id, account_id as accountId, type, amount, balance_before as balanceBefore, balance_after as balanceAfter, created_at as createdAt from transaction_history where account_id = #{accountId} order by created_at desc
